text: Delivered gale.spectral package (core/shared only, both platforms): Complex boundary type, GeneralizedEigenvalue (projective alpha/beta, isInfinite), GeneralizedSingularValue (Finite/Infinite/Zero), EigenOrder (+BothEnds, no imaginary cases), EigenSelection (All/Count/IndexRange/ValueInterval), SingularOrder/Selection, SpectralTarget (Around/ShiftInvert with explicit LinearSolvePlan reusing gale.solvers.SolverConfig), EigenVectors, SpectralOptions, SpectralDiagnostics (allConverged derived; requireConverged -> Left(DidNotConverge)), EigenDecomposition (complex-free symmetric), NonsymmetricEigenDecomposition (final class, private[gale] SoA + real-Schur packed DMat, caller-invisible via eigenvalue/isRealPair/eigenvector accessors, constructor enforces conjugate-pair adjacency positive-first + cols in {0,size}), SVD (+rank). Implemented by subagent, adversarially reviewed by fresh-context subagent (verdict: no bugs, packing hand-traced correct incl. edge cases), then hardened per review: packing well-formedness invariant + boundary-position pair tests (trailing/leading/adjacent pairs, malformed rejection). Deferred to phase-b implement beads: GSVD and GeneralizedEigen RESULT structs (element types exist). Producer contracts for kernel beads: snap negligible beta to exactly 0.0; vectors-not-computed = 0-column packed matrix; ncv default computed at call site when subspaceDimension=None. Verified independently: coreJVM 168/168, coreJS 168/168 (143 pre-existing + 25 spectral), lawsJVM+JS 17/17.
